label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 20

extraction.one_line_summary: POELS Wout attacked from 5-man breakaway group inside flamme rouge on final climb, held off EVENEPOEL Remco's late charge by margins.
tactical_patterns: 32-rider breakaway given 10+ minutes reveals GC teams completely ceding stage to non-contenders on penultimate mountain day.
EVENEPOEL attacked 70km out forcing selection but couldn't sustain on final climb, exposing fatigue after multi-stage dominance.
POELS attacked inside 1km from 5-man group, demonstrating late-attack timing advantage over pursuing chasers on short punchy finish.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: won three stages but couldn't convert breakaway presence to fourth, suggesting accumulated fatigue vulnerability
rider_signals.POELS Wout: positive: perfectly timed inside-line attack at 300m after surviving 10-climb attrition showed rare tactical sharpness
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: neutral: protected by ROGLIC and VINGEGAARD with 17-second GC margin, revealing Jumbo-Visma's conservative defensive approach
